SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-01-2018 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHARI MARKS APPEARED. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY STEVE SHATZ, LIABILITY RISK ANALYST. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THEIR MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MANI SHEIK, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF SHARI MARKS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA TRANSIT DISTRICT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVEN SHATZ, LIABILITY RISK ANALYST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARKS, SHARI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT $2,130.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,195.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY MARKS, SHARI AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO PRO TEM JUDGE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
